Customer Success & Enterprise Support Lead, APAC

Location

Tokyo

Employment Type

Full time

Location Type

Hybrid

Department

Customer Success & Support

Compensation

  • $140K – $165K • Offers Equity

U.S. Benefits

Full-time U.S. employees enjoy a comprehensive benefits program including equity, health, dental, vision, retirement, fitness, commuter and dependent care accounts, and more.

International Benefits

Full-time employees outside the U.S. enjoy a comprehensive benefits program tailored to their region of residence.

USD salary ranges apply only to U.S.-based positions. International salaries are set based on the local market. Final offer amounts are determined by multiple factors, including experience and expertise, and may vary from the amounts listed above.

More about yourself

For these questions, we're interested in hearing about your own experiences in your own authentic voice.

Perplexity Exercise

Before the interview process, we ask candidates to familiarize themselves with Perplexity's products. This exercise helps you get a head start, while also helping us learn a bit more about you.

Please choose either Option 1 or Option 2 below. We expect this exercise to take 2 minutes or less, although you're welcome to spend longer if you so desire. You may use any Perplexity product features you'd like, including but not limited to file uploads, model selection, Research, Comet Assistant, Computer, and more.

Option 1: teach us about your favorite topic!

Perplexity feeds the world's curiosity, and we're curious to learn more about your passions. Please choose a topic that you're particularly excited to share with us (it need not be technical or AI-related). Then, create a Perplexity thread that teaches us about your chosen topic.

Once you're happy with the thread, click the "Share" button and paste the URL below.

Option 2: enlist Perplexity as your champion!

We invite you to enlist Perplexity to advocate for your Perplexity job application! Please create a Perplexity thread that explains why you're a strong candidate for this role. Here's a very basic example; feel free to keep it simple, or to have some more fun with your queries.

Once you're happy with the thread, click the "Share" button and paste the URL below.

Do you agree to allow Perplexity to contact you about job opportunities for up to 2 years?
